Functions
fza_ase_fnc_rwr
Description

Proccessor function for the RADAR WARNING RECIEVER

Parameters
heli: Object

Vehicle the event handler is assigned to

Returns
_rwrObjects

[state, objectPos, "_iconClass"]

_rwrAudio

[object, "state", "_soundclass"];

Examples

[_heli] call fza_ase_fnc_rwr

Author

Snow(Dryden)
